items.title: Is UnitedHealth Group Stock a Buy, Sell, or Hold in 2026?
items.description: The healthcare stock trades at a significantly reduced valuation after an abysmal performance last year.

items.title: Behind Berkshire’s Curtain: Is Greg Abel Preparing to Cut Davita Loose?
items.description: Davita hit its 23rd new 52-week low on Tuesday. Its stock is now within a few dollars of trading in double digits. That’s not a good thing, given that its share price was nearly $180 a year ago.

items.title: FlexJobs Announces Top 100 Companies to Watch for Remote Jobs in 2026
items.description: FlexJobs®, the work-from-home jobs site, announces the release of the Top 100 Companies to Watch for Remote Jobs in 2026. The 13th annual list is based on an analysis of approximately 60,000 companies and their remote job posting histories in the FlexJobs database between January 1 and December 31, 2025.

items.title: Penny Cancer Stock Plus Therapeutics Raises $15 Million At Discount, Stock Plunges
items.description: Plus Therapeutics stock falls in premarket trading after pricing a $15 million public offering, with proceeds set for working capital as the company develops cancer treatments.

items.title: UnitedHealth Just Got a Checkup, and UNH Stock Has Some Big Problems to Treat in 2026. The Bull and Bear Cases Now.
items.description: UNH stock has some big problems to fix in 2026, but there is a bull case to be made. Here's the case for each and what analysts are saying about UnitedHealth.
